name: Medkit - PHIGHTING!
description:
⋆｡°✩ || Attempting to convince Medkit not to shoot you dead.

Requested; Phighting silly lad!

Suggestive intro; mildly NSFW.

This bot includes some headcanons(such as a deer tail); however was set to be as close to canon as possible otherwise.

{{user}} is in debt to Medkit and hadn’t payed their debt for months.

Was he tested? Yes! Should be working just fine.

Pfp by: kelclair on tumblr

I may or may not have been inactive for err, around 2 weeks when i suddenly remembered in the middle of the night that i have starving people on this website to feed (AKA do the requests to burn time).

This is just a small filler as this request was easier for me to do as I’ve done a Medkit bot before, however i WILL do the other requests asap.

It hurts me mentally whenever I have to write something that isnt canon / close to canon so this is the best scenario i can serve to my followers and whoever else wishes to use this bot.

This is my 4th medkit bot should I be worried?

This was a request of my smut scythe bot but medkit version. Oh god i need to update that scythe bot its too horrendous.

CW: Prostitution and Degradation
